title: REF Onsite Technician
description:
Job Responsibilities including but not limited to:

  • Install, repair, and maintain refrigeration systems, including refrigerators, and some others prism products.
  • Diagnose and troubleshoot system issues, including mechanical, electrical, and refrigerantrelated problems.
  • Repair or replace faulty components, such as compressors, condensers, evaporators, motors, and fans.
  • Perform regular preventive maintenance on refrigeration systems to ensure optimal performance and prevent breakdowns.
  • Conduct system tests to verify performance, temperature control, and refrigerant levels.
  • Calibrate temperature controls, thermostats, and pressure switches as needed.
  • Follow safety protocols and guidelines to ensure a safe working environment.
  • Adhere to relevant regulations, codes, and industry standards for handling refrigerants and electrical systems.
  • Maintain accurate records of repairs, maintenance activities, and parts inventory.
  • Provide excellent customer service by addressing client inquiries and resolving issues promptly.
  • Stay updated with advancements in refrigeration technology, industry trends, and best practices.
  • Collaborate with team members and contractors to complete projects and assignments.
  • Any other ad-hoc duties as assigned by superior/or managery.

Requirements:

  • Min O-Level or equivalent. Relevant certifications or vocational training is a plus.
  • Min 2 years’ experience as a Refrigeration Technician or similar role.
  • Strong knowledge of refrigeration systems and components.
  • Familiarity with electrical systems and troubleshooting techniques.
  • Ability to read and interpret technical manuals and diagrams.
  • Excellent problem-solving and analytical skills.
  • Detail-oriented with a strong commitment to quality and safety.
  • Excellent communication and customer service skills.
  • Ability to work independently and under pressure.
  • Possess Class 3 License would be an added advantage

postedCompany.description:
Mandate of Manpower Pte. Ltd. (UEN 201837939H) (F.K.A. Mandate of Old Times Pte. Ltd.) was founded in 2018. We provide a manpower solutions which allows clients to source cleaning and general staffing from us.

At Mandate of Manpower, we specialise in providing high quality part-time residential cleaning services. We aim to have effective communication with our clients which allows our services to be effective. We also supply multiple different labour solutions for both hotels and events. Hotel services include housekeeping and public area attendants while stewards can be supplied to events.
postedCompany.name: MANDATE OF MANPOWER PTE. LTD.
